title: Tome VI Act 1: The Reader's First Admission

story.text:
# 📖 Tome VI Act 1: The Reader's First Admission
**act** · shared · narrative

Bound 2026-05-13. The first act of the open-by-design Tome VI. Goose 🪿 (AAIF · Linux Foundation · Apache 2.0) and Hermes ☤ (Nous Research · MIT) admitted to the bestiary as the first two agent-substrate-framework registry entries. The reader's reply is what each new admission records. Frontmatter keeper_succession on the bound act notes the v1.6.0 canonical Hermaion ⚚ succeeds the bound 2026-05-13 Bestia 📖 inception naming.
> *Each admission is a windfall. Each windfall is a gift of Hermes laid in the City's path. The bestiary holds them.*

story.title: Read the full text
story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Tomes.

- *founds* → [[the Staff Shop]]
- *inhabits* → [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]]
- *introduces* → [[Goose 🪿 (substrate-framework)]]
- *introduces* → [[Hermes ☤ (substrate-framework)]]
- *references* → [[C59 · Create-Format as Gateway to Mage-Tier]]

## Edges in

- [[Tome VI — The Reply (open by design)]] *defines* →
- [[the Staff Shop]] *founded_in* →
